rforhta
  • Preface
  • introduction to data in health economics
  • Introduction
  • References
  • Data Visualisation

Data Visualisation

library(here)
here() starts at /Users/user/repos/public/rforhta
library(tidyverse)
── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
✔ ggplot2   3.5.1     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.3     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
✔ purrr     1.0.2     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
source(here("_common.R"))

The following data used is the Innovation Scorecard (NICE Technology Appraisals in the NHS in England) to October 2024 at the ICB level. If you’re not familiar with this dataset, it is found here (“Background and Introduction | NHSBSA” (n.d.)) and “aims to improve transparency within the NHS of what treatments recommended by NICE are available at a local level. The local level can be within trusts and ICBs as well as national and NHS England region levels. The Innovation Scorecard has been published with the intention of assisting the NHS in the identification of variation which, through discussion, can be explained, challenged, or acted upon. It is not intended to be used for performance management.”.

dat_grp <- read.csv(file = here("./data/nice-tech-apps-eng-oct24-ICB-Group.csv"))

dat_grp1 <- dat_grp %>% filter(year == "2023_24", quarter == 1, data_source == "Secondary Care", treatment_type == "medicine")
head(dat_grp1)
#>      year quarter year_quarter    data_type    data_source treatment_type
#> 1 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 2 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 3 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 4 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 5 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 6 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#>                  treatment_name provider_code
#> 1 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QE1
#> 2 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QF7
#> 3 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QGH
#> 4 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QH8
#> 5 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QHG
#> 6 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QHL
#>                                                     provider_name numerator
#> 1          NHS LANCASHIRE AND SOUTH CUMBRIA INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   20617.0
#> 2                       NHS SOUTH YORKSHIRE INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   34048.5
#> 3      NHS HEREFORDSHIRE AND WORCESTERSHIRE INTEGRATED CARE BOARD    5568.5
#> 4                   NHS MID AND SOUTH ESSEX INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   17110.5
#> 5 NHS BEDFORDSHIRE, LUTON AND MILTON KEYNES INTEGRATED CARE BOARD    7490.0
#> 6               NHS BIRMINGHAM AND SOLIHULL INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   20841.0
#>   numerator_unit    high_level_condition denominator denominator_unit
#> 1            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1737241       Population
#> 2            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1392105       Population
#> 3            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome      797935       Population
#> 4            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1209480       Population
#> 5            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1015380       Population
#> 6            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1375281       Population
#>       value                 value_unit expected_days_of_treatment
#> 1 1186.7668 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 2 2445.8284 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 3  697.8639 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 4 1414.6989 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 5  737.6549 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 6 1515.3994 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#>   expected_upper_range expected_lower_range ratio_observed.expected
#> 1                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 2                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 3                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 4                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 5                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 6                   NA                   NA                      NA
#>   upper_ratio_observed.expected lower_ratio_observed.expected
#> 1                            NA                            NA
#> 2                            NA                            NA
#> 3                            NA                            NA
#> 4                            NA                            NA
#> 5                            NA                            NA
#> 6                            NA                            NA
#>   provider_ons_code
#> 1         E54000048
#> 2         E54000061
#> 3         E54000019
#> 4         E54000026
#> 5         E54000024
#> 6         E54000055
unique(dat_grp1$treatment_name)
#>  [1] "ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP"                             
#>  [2] "COVID-19 GROUP"                                            
#>  [3] "CYSTIC FIBROSIS GROUP"                                     
#>  [4] "EGFR NON-SMALL-CELL LUNG CANCER GROUP"                     
#>  [5] "HATTR POLYNEUROPATHY GROUP"                                
#>  [6] "HEPATITIS C GROUP"                                         
#>  [7] "ICOSAPENT ETHYL GROUP"                                     
#>  [8] "METASTATIC PROSTATE CANCER GROUP"                          
#>  [9] "MIGRAINE GROUP"                                            
#> [10] "MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS GROUP"                                  
#> [11] "OBESITY GROUP"                                             
#> [12] "PRIMARY HYPERCHOLESTEROLAEMIA GROUP"                       
#> [13] "SEVERE ASTHMA GROUP"                                       
#> [14] "SGLT-2 INHIBITORS GROUP"                                   
#> [15] "SMOKING CESSATION GROUP"                                   
#> [16] "abiraterone acetate"                                       
#> [17] "afatinib"                                                  
#> [18] "alemtuzumab"                                               
#> [19] "alirocumab"                                                
#> [20] "apalutamide"                                               
#> [21] "benralizumab"                                              
#> [22] "cabazitaxel"                                               
#> [23] "canagliflozin"                                             
#> [24] "cladribine (Mavenclad only)"                               
#> [25] "dacomitinib"                                               
#> [26] "dapagliflozin"                                             
#> [27] "dimethyl fumarate (Tecfidera only)"                        
#> [28] "diroximel fumarate"                                        
#> [29] "elbasvir-grazoprevir"                                      
#> [30] "empagliflozin"                                             
#> [31] "enzalutamide"                                              
#> [32] "eptinezumab"                                               
#> [33] "erenumab (140mg only)"                                     
#> [34] "erlotinib (150mg only)"                                    
#> [35] "ertugliflozin"                                             
#> [36] "evolocumab"                                                
#> [37] "fingolimod"                                                
#> [38] "fremanezumab"                                              
#> [39] "galcanezumab"                                              
#> [40] "gefitinib"                                                 
#> [41] "glatiramer acetate"                                        
#> [42] "glecaprevir-pibrentasvir"                                  
#> [43] "icosapent ethyl"                                           
#> [44] "inclisiran"                                                
#> [45] "inotersen"                                                 
#> [46] "interferon beta-1a"                                        
#> [47] "interferon beta-1b (Extavia only)"                         
#> [48] "ivacaftor (branded as Kalydeco)"                           
#> [49] "ivacaftor, tezacaftor and elexacaftor (branded as Kaftrio)"
#> [50] "ledipasvir-sofosbuvir"                                     
#> [51] "liraglutide (Saxenda only)"                                
#> [52] "lumacaftor-ivacaftor (branded as Orkambi)"                 
#> [53] "mepolizumab"                                               
#> [54] "natalizumab"                                               
#> [55] "nirmatrelvir with ritonavir"                               
#> [56] "ocrelizumab"                                               
#> [57] "ofatumumab"                                                
#> [58] "omalizumab"                                                
#> [59] "osimertinib"                                               
#> [60] "patisiran"                                                 
#> [61] "peginterferon beta-1a"                                     
#> [62] "ponesimod"                                                 
#> [63] "prasugrel"                                                 
#> [64] "remdesivir"                                                
#> [65] "reslizumab"                                                
#> [66] "rivaroxaban (2.5mg tabs only)"                             
#> [67] "semaglutide (Wegovy only)"                                 
#> [68] "siponimod"                                                 
#> [69] "sofosbuvir-velpatasvir"                                    
#> [70] "sofosbuvir-velpatasvir-voxilaprevir"                       
#> [71] "sotrovimab"                                                
#> [72] "teriflunomide"                                             
#> [73] "tezacaftor and ivacaftor (branded as Symkevi)"             
#> [74] "tezepelumab"                                               
#> [75] "ticagrelor (90mg tabs only)"                               
#> [76] "varenicline"                                               
#> [77] "vutrisiran"                                                
#> [78] "DOAC SECONDARY GROUP"                                      
#> [79] "apixaban (2.5mg tabs only)"                                
#> [80] "dabigatran etexilate (75mg and 110mg caps only)"           
#> [81] "rivaroxaban (10mg tabs only)"
dat_ut <- read.csv(file = here("./data/nice-tech-apps-eng-oct24-ICB-Utilisation.csv"))

dat_ut1 <- dat_grp %>% filter(year == "2023_24", quarter == 1, data_source == "Secondary Care", treatment_type == "medicine")
head(dat_ut1)
#>      year quarter year_quarter    data_type    data_source treatment_type
#> 1 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 2 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 3 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 4 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 5 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#> 6 2023_24       1   2023/24 Q1 ICB Grouping Secondary Care       medicine
#>                  treatment_name provider_code
#> 1 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QE1
#> 2 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QF7
#> 3 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QGH
#> 4 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QH8
#> 5 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QHG
#> 6 ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP           QHL
#>                                                     provider_name numerator
#> 1          NHS LANCASHIRE AND SOUTH CUMBRIA INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   20617.0
#> 2                       NHS SOUTH YORKSHIRE INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   34048.5
#> 3      NHS HEREFORDSHIRE AND WORCESTERSHIRE INTEGRATED CARE BOARD    5568.5
#> 4                   NHS MID AND SOUTH ESSEX INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   17110.5
#> 5 NHS BEDFORDSHIRE, LUTON AND MILTON KEYNES INTEGRATED CARE BOARD    7490.0
#> 6               NHS BIRMINGHAM AND SOLIHULL INTEGRATED CARE BOARD   20841.0
#>   numerator_unit    high_level_condition denominator denominator_unit
#> 1            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1737241       Population
#> 2            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1392105       Population
#> 3            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome      797935       Population
#> 4            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1209480       Population
#> 5            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1015380       Population
#> 6            ADD Acute Coronary Syndrome     1375281       Population
#>       value                 value_unit expected_days_of_treatment
#> 1 1186.7668 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 2 2445.8284 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 3  697.8639 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 4 1414.6989 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 5  737.6549 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#> 6 1515.3994 ADD per 100,000 population                         NA
#>   expected_upper_range expected_lower_range ratio_observed.expected
#> 1                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 2                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 3                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 4                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 5                   NA                   NA                      NA
#> 6                   NA                   NA                      NA
#>   upper_ratio_observed.expected lower_ratio_observed.expected
#> 1                            NA                            NA
#> 2                            NA                            NA
#> 3                            NA                            NA
#> 4                            NA                            NA
#> 5                            NA                            NA
#> 6                            NA                            NA
#>   provider_ons_code
#> 1         E54000048
#> 2         E54000061
#> 3         E54000019
#> 4         E54000026
#> 5         E54000024
#> 6         E54000055
unique(dat_ut1$treatment_name)
#>  [1] "ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME GROUP"                             
#>  [2] "COVID-19 GROUP"                                            
#>  [3] "CYSTIC FIBROSIS GROUP"                                     
#>  [4] "EGFR NON-SMALL-CELL LUNG CANCER GROUP"                     
#>  [5] "HATTR POLYNEUROPATHY GROUP"                                
#>  [6] "HEPATITIS C GROUP"                                         
#>  [7] "ICOSAPENT ETHYL GROUP"                                     
#>  [8] "METASTATIC PROSTATE CANCER GROUP"                          
#>  [9] "MIGRAINE GROUP"                                            
#> [10] "MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS GROUP"                                  
#> [11] "OBESITY GROUP"                                             
#> [12] "PRIMARY HYPERCHOLESTEROLAEMIA GROUP"                       
#> [13] "SEVERE ASTHMA GROUP"                                       
#> [14] "SGLT-2 INHIBITORS GROUP"                                   
#> [15] "SMOKING CESSATION GROUP"                                   
#> [16] "abiraterone acetate"                                       
#> [17] "afatinib"                                                  
#> [18] "alemtuzumab"                                               
#> [19] "alirocumab"                                                
#> [20] "apalutamide"                                               
#> [21] "benralizumab"                                              
#> [22] "cabazitaxel"                                               
#> [23] "canagliflozin"                                             
#> [24] "cladribine (Mavenclad only)"                               
#> [25] "dacomitinib"                                               
#> [26] "dapagliflozin"                                             
#> [27] "dimethyl fumarate (Tecfidera only)"                        
#> [28] "diroximel fumarate"                                        
#> [29] "elbasvir-grazoprevir"                                      
#> [30] "empagliflozin"                                             
#> [31] "enzalutamide"                                              
#> [32] "eptinezumab"                                               
#> [33] "erenumab (140mg only)"                                     
#> [34] "erlotinib (150mg only)"                                    
#> [35] "ertugliflozin"                                             
#> [36] "evolocumab"                                                
#> [37] "fingolimod"                                                
#> [38] "fremanezumab"                                              
#> [39] "galcanezumab"                                              
#> [40] "gefitinib"                                                 
#> [41] "glatiramer acetate"                                        
#> [42] "glecaprevir-pibrentasvir"                                  
#> [43] "icosapent ethyl"                                           
#> [44] "inclisiran"                                                
#> [45] "inotersen"                                                 
#> [46] "interferon beta-1a"                                        
#> [47] "interferon beta-1b (Extavia only)"                         
#> [48] "ivacaftor (branded as Kalydeco)"                           
#> [49] "ivacaftor, tezacaftor and elexacaftor (branded as Kaftrio)"
#> [50] "ledipasvir-sofosbuvir"                                     
#> [51] "liraglutide (Saxenda only)"                                
#> [52] "lumacaftor-ivacaftor (branded as Orkambi)"                 
#> [53] "mepolizumab"                                               
#> [54] "natalizumab"                                               
#> [55] "nirmatrelvir with ritonavir"                               
#> [56] "ocrelizumab"                                               
#> [57] "ofatumumab"                                                
#> [58] "omalizumab"                                                
#> [59] "osimertinib"                                               
#> [60] "patisiran"                                                 
#> [61] "peginterferon beta-1a"                                     
#> [62] "ponesimod"                                                 
#> [63] "prasugrel"                                                 
#> [64] "remdesivir"                                                
#> [65] "reslizumab"                                                
#> [66] "rivaroxaban (2.5mg tabs only)"                             
#> [67] "semaglutide (Wegovy only)"                                 
#> [68] "siponimod"                                                 
#> [69] "sofosbuvir-velpatasvir"                                    
#> [70] "sofosbuvir-velpatasvir-voxilaprevir"                       
#> [71] "sotrovimab"                                                
#> [72] "teriflunomide"                                             
#> [73] "tezacaftor and ivacaftor (branded as Symkevi)"             
#> [74] "tezepelumab"                                               
#> [75] "ticagrelor (90mg tabs only)"                               
#> [76] "varenicline"                                               
#> [77] "vutrisiran"                                                
#> [78] "DOAC SECONDARY GROUP"                                      
#> [79] "apixaban (2.5mg tabs only)"                                
#> [80] "dabigatran etexilate (75mg and 110mg caps only)"           
#> [81] "rivaroxaban (10mg tabs only)"
dat_ut1 %>% filter(high_level_condition == "Obesity") %>%  ggplot(aes(x = treatment_name, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Utilisation by Treatment Type within Breast Cancer",
       y = "DDD per 100,000 population",
       x = "Treatment Type") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
dat1 %>%
  group_by(provider_name) %>%
  summarize(avg_utilization = mean(value)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_utilization)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(provider_name, avg_utilization), y = avg_utilization)) +
  geom_point() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Top 10 Providers by Average Utilization",
       x = "Provider Name",
       y = "Average DDD per 100,000 population")
ggplot(dat1, aes(x = high_level_condition, y = value, fill = treatment_type)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Treatment Utilization by Condition",
       y = "DDD per 100,000 population",
       x = "Condition") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)
# First, let's calculate percentages and trend analysis for each treatment
treatment_trends <- dat_ut %>%
  group_by(year_quarter, treatment_name) %>%
  summarize(total_ddd = sum(numerator, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(year_quarter) %>%
  mutate(
    period_total = sum(total_ddd),
    percentage = (total_ddd / period_total) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(treatment_name, year_quarter)
#> `summarise()` has grouped output by 'year_quarter'. You can override using
#> the `.groups` argument.

# Let's visualize this for the top treatments
top_treatments <- treatment_trends %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  summarize(avg_percentage = mean(percentage)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_percentage)) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  pull(treatment_name)

# Create a line plot showing trends
ggplot(
  treatment_trends %>% filter(treatment_name %in% top_treatments),
  aes(x = year_quarter, y = percentage, color = treatment_name, group = treatment_name)
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Treatment Usage Trends Over Time",
    y = "Percentage of Total Prescriptions",
    x = "Quarter"
  )

# Calculate year-over-year changes
yoy_changes <- treatment_trends %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_year_percentage = lag(percentage, n = 4),  # assuming 4 quarters per year
    yoy_change = percentage - prev_year_percentage
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(yoy_change))

# Print summary statistics for key treatments
summary_stats <- yoy_changes %>%
  filter(treatment_name %in% top_treatments) %>%
  group_by(treatment_name) %>%
  summarize(
    current_percentage = last(percentage),
    year_ago_percentage = last(prev_year_percentage),
    change = last(yoy_change),
    earliest_percentage = first(percentage)
  )

# Print the summary
print(summary_stats)
#> # A tibble: 5 × 5
#>   treatment_name current_percentage year_ago_percentage  change
#>   <chr>                       <dbl>               <dbl>   <dbl>
#> 1 daratumumab                 15.8                12.6   3.27  
#> 2 encorafenib                  7.44                7.36  0.0811
#> 3 olaparib                    25.3                26.2  -0.881 
#> 4 rucaparib                    6.42               10.3  -3.89  
#> 5 sapropterin                 10.2                 9.70  0.453 
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: earliest_percentage <dbl>

References

“Background and Introduction | NHSBSA.” n.d. Accessed December 20, 2024. https://www.nhsbsa.nhs.uk/statistical-collections/nice-technology-appraisals/nice-technology-appraisals-nhs-england-innovation-scorecard-june-2024/background-and-introduction.
